Dane Burgess Customer Support Director Culture Amp 95% Global CSAT Score Jared Ellis Global Director for Product Support Your questions, answered How does Intercom pricing work? Pricing depends on whether you’re purchasing our customer service platform with Fin AI Agent, or Fin with your current helpdesk including (Zendesk, Salesforce, and more). Pricing for Fin AI Agent on Intercom: Fin AI Agent is priced at $0.99 per outcome. An outcome is counted when: Fin resolves a conversation - the customer confirms Fin resolved their issue, or they do not request for more help after Fin answers, or Fin executes a Procedure* - that ends in a resolution or an intentional handoff. You’ll only be charged once per conversation, even if Fin resolves multiple questions. * Applies only to customers using Procedures. Procedures train Fin to handle complex, multi-step customer queries like subscription issues or refunds. You'll need at least one seat from one of our three plans (Essential, Advanced or Expert) to start using Fin on Intercom. Pricing for Intercom's customer service platform: When purchasing Intercom’s customer service platform, you’ll choose from three plans: Essential, Advanced, or Expert. The plan you choose determines your seat price. You’ll then be charged based on the number of teammates who require Full seats. Full seats provide complete access to all features in your plan and are charged per teammate. You can learn more about Seat types here . All our plans include access to: Fin AI Agent: $0.99 per outcome—meaning you only pay for the value it delivers. Messaging channels: Usage-based pricing for SMS, phone, product tours, and more. Learn more here . Pricing for Fin on Zendesk or Salesforce Fin AI Agent is priced at $0.99 per outcome. An outcome is counted when: Fin resolves a conversation - the customer confirms Fin resolved their issue, or they do not request for more help after Fin answers, or Fin executes a Procedure* - that ends in a resolution or an intentional handoff. You’ll only be charged once per conversation, even if Fin resolves multiple questions. * Applies only to customers using Procedures. Procedures train Fin to handle complex, multi-step customer queries like subscription issues or refunds. No extra fees: There are no additional costs—no integration fees, setup fees, or platform charges. How does the free trial work? Intercom’s free trial requires no credit card to sign up. During the 14-day trial, you’ll have access to all the products and features available in the Essential, Advanced, and Expert plans, as well as Proactive Support Plus, Fin AI Agent, and Copilot. This allows you to experience the full range of features included in your chosen plan. Note: The free trial is designed for our AI-first customer service platform and its features. If you’re interested in using Fin on your current helpdesk, our sales team will work closely with you to ensure it’s the right fit for your needs. After the free trial period, just add your credit card details to continue using Intercom. What is Fin AI Agent? Fin AI Agent is an advanced AI agent that provides fast, accurate answers to customers 24/7 via live chat, email, SMS, Whatsapp, social and more. Fin is the highest-performing AI agent for customer service, delivering higher-quality answers and resolving more complex queries than any other AI agent. Fin is powered by the patented Fin AI Engine™, an AI architecture specifically engineered for customer service. Every layer is optimized for precision, speed, and reliability—so Fin can resolve more conversations, more effectively than competing AI agents. All Intercom plans include access to Fin.Fin is priced at $0.99 per outcome — meaning you only pay for the value it delivers. An outcome is counted when: Fin resolves a conversation - the customer confirms Fin resolved their issue, or they do not request for more help after Fin answers, or Fin executes a Procedure* - that ends in a resolution or an intentional handoff. You’ll only be charged once per conversation, even if Fin resolves multiple questions. * Applies only to customers using Procedures.
